name: Deep-Fried Wonton Cookies ( Teem Gok)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together prunes, apricots, brown sugar, coconut, and almonds.
2. Place about 2 teaspoons of the mixture in the center of each wonton skin.
3. Moisten the edges with water.
4. Fold each skin in half to form a triangle.
5. Press the edges firmly to seal them.
6. Cover to prevent drying.
7. Heat oil (1 to 1 1/2 inches) to 360°F.
8. Fry 3 to 4 wontons at a time, turning occasionally, until golden brown, about 1 minute on each side.
9. Drain the fried wonton cookies.
10. Cool thoroughly and store in an airtight container.
11. Serve with ice cream or sherbet if desired.
